question: Which of these objects occupies the center of the image? Select from the following options: (A) The ruins of an ancient temple lit up at night. (B) A column on a building. (C) A view of tall buildings lit up at night. (D) A city skyline at night with a lot of buildings.
answer_choices: The ruins of an ancient temple lit up at night
A view of tall buildings lit up at night
A city skyline at night with a lot of buildings
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
